Structure# IOI2CBusTiming

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.3+

```
typedef struct IOI2CBusTiming {
    ...
} IOI2CBusTiming;
```

## [Topics](/documentation/iokit/ioi2cbustiming#topics)

### [Instance Properties](/documentation/iokit/ioi2cbustiming#2860981)

[`acknowledgeTimeout`](/documentation/iokit/ioi2cbustiming/1410369-acknowledgetimeout)Maximum time to wait for a client to respond with an ACK after writing a byte.[`bitTimeout`](/documentation/iokit/ioi2cbustiming/1410318-bittimeout)Maximum time a client can delay (by pulling the clock line low) a single bit response.[`byteTimeout`](/documentation/iokit/ioi2cbustiming/1410362-bytetimeout)Maximum time a client can delay (by pulling the clock line low) the first bit of a byte response.[`holdTime`](/documentation/iokit/ioi2cbustiming/1410335-holdtime)[`riseFallTime`](/documentation/iokit/ioi2cbustiming/1410322-risefalltime)Time to wait after any change in output signal.[`startTimeout`](/documentation/iokit/ioi2cbustiming/1410316-starttimeout)Maximum time to wait for a client to respond after a start signal.
